markdown:
#  Create a Change Event from an Instruction 
##  Background 
If you have issued an instruction that leads to a change event (see Change Event, you can create a change event from the Instructions tool. When you create the change event, information from the instruction is automatically added, and a link to the instruction is added to the 'Origin' field of the change event.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * You need both:
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Instructions tool.
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Change Events tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The Instructions tool has been developed specifically for Procore clients in Australia, New Zealand, and Canada.
    * The number and title of the instruction are automatically added to the 'Origin' field of the change event.
    * The following information from the instruction will also carry over to the change event:
      * Title
      * Description
      * Attachments
  * **Alternate ways to create change events** :
    * To learn how to use other Procore platforms and tools to create a change event, see [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Instructions** tool.
  2. Click **View** on the instruction you want to create a change event from.
  3. Click **+ Create Change Event**.  
_Note_ : You will be redirected to the create page in the Change Events tool.
  4. Enter the necessary information for the change event.   
See [Create a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event).   
_Note_ : The instruction number and title are automatically added to the 'Origin' field of the change event. The title, description, and any attachments that were added to the instruction are also added to the change event.
  5. Click **Create**.


## See Also
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
  * [Which budget views should I add to my Procore projects?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-budget-views-should-i-add-to-my-projects)
  * [What are "related items" in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-related-items-in-procore)


A _Change Event_ is any event resulting in a modification that affects the _scope of work_ on a construction project and the project's schedule and/or cost(s). In Procore, a change event can be recorded in the system and precedes the creation of a _change order_ , which allows your team members and stakeholders to prepare for a cost change before it becomes an actual cost.
title: Create a Change Event from an Instruction
description: How to create a change event from an instruction in Procore.
